message:
test(server): add timeline preset lifecycle integration test in PTY e2e suite

Add timeline_preset_shortcuts_persist_and_reload_filters test that
exercises the full save/load/delete preset lifecycle via simulated
keyboard input against a MailAppModel wired to a real Config with
console_persist_path pointing to a temp directory:

1. Switch to Timeline screen and change verbosity/kind/source filters
   to non-default values.
2. Open Ctrl+S dialog, clear default name, type "alpha", press Enter.
3. Verify the on-disk preset store contains "alpha" with the expected
   verbosity=verbose value and non-empty kind/source tokens.
4. Press 'c' to clear filters, then Ctrl+L + Enter to reload "alpha".
5. Save again as "beta" and assert beta.values == alpha.values,
   confirming the load dialog correctly restored all filter state.
6. Open Ctrl+L, Delete twice to remove both presets, then Escape.
7. Verify the on-disk store has no remaining timeline presets.
8. Render a frame to confirm no panics in the post-delete state.

Also adds new_model_with_config() helper and imports for
load_screen_filter_presets and screen_filter_presets_path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
